data.name: Sex Wish: A Deliciously Naughty Porn VN
data.detailed_description:
Imagine being granted a single, all-powerful wish. The possibilities are endless, but so are the consequences. In "Sex Wish," a tantalizing adult visual novel, you're not only the wisher, but also the architect of destiny for a group of friends whose deepest desires are about to become their reality.

Experience the Thrill of Unpredictable Consequences

  • Choose Your Path: Navigate the intricate web of relationships and desires, making pivotal decisions that impact not just one, but multiple characters.

  • Dynamic Storytelling: No two playthroughs are alike, as your choices unlock unique scenes, forge unexpected bonds, and test the limits of your characters' newfound realities.

  • Over 200 Sultry Animations: Indulge in a rich, immersive experience, brought to life by an extensive library of explicit, yet tastefully crafted animations.

A Game of Desire, Not Grinding

  • No Sandbox, No Grinding: Focus on the story, the characters, and the thrill of your choices, without the burden of repetitive gameplay.

  • Optional Themes: Engage with or effortlessly avoid sharing/NTR content, tailored to your comfort and preferences. Your choices make it easy to keep the girls all for yourself.

Experiment, Explore, and Unleash Your Desires

  • Multiple Playthroughs, Endless Possibilities: Discover new paths, new relationships, and new consequences with each playthrough.

  • Character-Driven Narrative: Understand and respond to the unique needs and desires of each character, unlocking a deeper, more satisfying experience.

Dive into the World of "Sex Wish" Today!

  • MILF

  • Anal

  • Cam Girl

  • Maledom

  • FFM

  • Voyeurism

  • Cumplay

  • BDSM

  • Sharing/NTR (OPTIONAL and EASY TO AVOID)

data.short_description: Unleash desire's power! Over 200 sultry animations, dynamic storytelling, and multiple playthroughs. Guide a group of friends through the consequences of their deepest wishes. Choose your path, navigate relationships, and face the thrill of unpredictable consequences.

英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Game is non-notarized. May not work with 10.15 Catalina

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
